summary: Verified mobile responsiveness fix for AlertDashboardV2.js at 375px, 768px, and 1920px viewports. All target behaviors confirmed working: mobile header with ALERTS/BAG tabs, hidden sidebar on mobile, mobile alert card layout, working modal, responsive footer, and proper desktop sidebar at 1920px.

issues: NEW ALERT and COINS buttons sit side-by-side (flex-1 each, ~167px wide) rather than each being full-width on a row. User request was 'full-width action buttons' — current implementation makes them share the row width. If the intent was each button taking the entire row width (stacked), consider flex-col on mobile. Currently functional and visually clean — flagging as a UX interpretation note only.

critical_code_review_comments: AlertDashboardV2.js is 1199 lines — exceeds 700-line guideline. Split into smaller modules: extract CreateAlertModal and RequestCoinModal into separate files (each ~200-300 lines); they are already self-contained.
Two effects use selectedAsset/isOpen as deps without eslint-disable comments — non-blocking but consider including referenced functions or moving to useCallback to match React hooks rules.
Trial banner & alert-create gating relies on subscription.status checks duplicated in 3 places. Extract to a single derived variable (already partially done with canCreateAlerts).
seed_data_creation: None. Existing BTC $100,000 above alert used for verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile responsive layout fully verified. Test results: (a) 375px mobile: sidebar hidden via lg:hidden, mobile header (CRYPTOBAGTRACKER + ALERTS/BAG tabs + logout) visible, mobile alert cards render via md:hidden, desktop table hidden, Create Alert modal opens and fits 343x267px inside 375px viewport, footer stacks. (b) 768px tablet: still uses mobile header (lg=1024), but switches to desktop table layout (md=768). (c) 1920px desktop: full sidebar with nav-alerts and nav-portfolio visible, mobile header hidden, table layout with all 6 columns. All data-testids resolve correctly. Pages verified: login flow works, mobile dashboard at 375px renders cleanly without overflow or broken layout.
rca of the issue: Previous mobile layout was broken due to missing closing tag and lack of responsive Tailwind classes. Current fix uses lg:hidden for mobile header, hidden lg:flex for sidebar, md:hidden + hidden md:block to swap card/table layouts. Fix verified end-to-end at 3 breakpoints with screenshots confirming visual correctness.
